title: MWR - Mods Within Reason
body:
![Mods Within Reason Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f19da62e9e41f3e2623a93cb43b970f65457ad.jpeg) # **THIS PAGE IS A WORK IN PROGRESS.** I'll finish this when I have enough time. Loading Screen image credit: Khyle (@khyleri on twitter) Mods Within Reason is a tech / magic focused modpack with tons of structures to explore, and bosses to defeat. Arm yourself and explore the bustling world, filled with adventure and overflowing with magic. Expand your armory, master the magical arts, or evolve your world with technology, the choice is yours. This modpack was created for my group of friends to play together, but has evolved into a a very reasonable modpack. Join Our Discord to report bugs and suggest new mods and features! [MWR Discord](https://discord.gg/grT5gwHzb5) Modlist
